message.content:
Subject: Immediate Resolution for Your Order Delay

Dear [Customer's Name],

I hope this email finds you well. I am deeply sorry for the inconvenience caused by the delay in your recent shipment. We understand that this has probably disrupted your plans and we sincerely apologize for the frustration and disappointment this has caused you.

First and foremost, we want to assure you that we are here to assist you quickly and efficiently. We regret that our shipping process encountered some unexpected delays in the delivery of your order. These delays are often caused by factors outside our control, such as severe weather conditions or unforeseen issues with our carriers.

To make amends and to ensure our partnership does not suffer any further, we would like to offer you a 20% discount on your next purchase with us. We value your custom and are committed to providing you with the best service possible. Please find the coupon code attached to this email, which you can use for your next order at checkout.

If you have any further issues or concerns, please do not hesitate to reach out to our customer service team. We are available 24/7 to assist you.

Once again, we apologize for any inconvenience experienced. We are committed to ensuring that your next experience with us is smooth and satisfactory.

Best regards,

[Your Full Name]  
[Your Position]  
[Your Contact Information]  
[Company Name]
